criteria_verification.criterion_text: `ManifestRegistry` is an `ABC` — cannot be instantiated directly
criteria_verification.evidence: ManifestRegistry uses abc.ABC as base class with @abc.abstractmethod on all 6 methods (register, deregister, get, list_all, find_by_intent, find_by_tool). Tests verify TypeError on direct instantiation and presence of all abstract methods in __abstractmethods__.
criteria_verification.notes: ManifestRegistry uses abc.ABC as base class with @abc.abstractmethod on all 6 methods (register, deregister, get, list_all, find_by_intent, find_by_tool). Tests verify TypeError on direct instantiation and presence of all abstract methods in __abstractmethods__.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `InMemoryManifestRegistry.register()` upserts — re-registering the same `agent_id` replaces previous entry
criteria_verification.evidence: InMemoryManifestRegistry.register() stores manifest in _store dict keyed by agent_id, so re-registration naturally overwrites. Test test_register_overwrites_existing registers two manifests with same agent_id and verifies the second replaces the first.
criteria_verification.notes: InMemoryManifestRegistry.register() stores manifest in _store dict keyed by agent_id, so re-registration naturally overwrites. Test test_register_overwrites_existing registers two manifests with same agent_id and verifies the second replaces the first.

criteria_verification.evidence: register() checks 'if not manifest.intents' and raises ValueError with message 'at least one intent capability is required'. Test test_register_empty_intents_raises verifies ValueError is raised with matching message.
criteria_verification.notes: register() checks 'if not manifest.intents' and raises ValueError with message 'at least one intent capability is required'. Test test_register_empty_intents_raises verifies ValueError is raised with matching message.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `InMemoryManifestRegistry.deregister()` is idempotent — no error if `agent_id` unknown
criteria_verification.evidence: deregister() uses dict.pop(agent_id, None) which silently returns None for missing keys. Tests verify no error on unknown agent_id and double-deregister.
criteria_verification.notes: deregister() uses dict.pop(agent_id, None) which silently returns None for missing keys. Tests verify no error on unknown agent_id and double-deregister.

criteria_verification.evidence: get() uses dict.get(agent_id) which returns None for missing keys. Test test_get_unknown_returns_none verifies this behavior.
criteria_verification.notes: get() uses dict.get(agent_id) which returns None for missing keys. Test test_get_unknown_returns_none verifies this behavior.

criteria_verification.evidence: find_by_intent() uses 'cap.pattern == intent' for exact string comparison. Changed from fnmatch glob matching to exact matching per task spec. Test test_find_by_intent_exact_not_glob verifies that pattern 'software.*' does NOT glob-match 'software.build' but DOES match 'software.*' exactly.
criteria_verification.notes: find_by_intent() uses 'cap.pattern == intent' for exact string comparison. Changed from fnmatch glob matching to exact matching per task spec. Test test_find_by_intent_exact_not_glob verifies that pattern 'software.*' does NOT glob-match 'software.build' but DOES match 'software.*' exactly.

criteria_verification.evidence: find_by_tool() uses 'tool.name == tool_name' for exact string comparison. Tests verify exact match, no match, multiple agents, and multiple tools scenarios.
criteria_verification.notes: find_by_tool() uses 'tool.name == tool_name' for exact string comparison. Tests verify exact match, no match, multiple agents, and multiple tools scenarios.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: All methods are `async` — `InMemoryManifestRegistry` must be awaitable even without I/O
criteria_verification.evidence: All 6 ABC methods and all 6 InMemoryManifestRegistry methods are declared with 'async def'. TestRegistryMethodsAreAsync class has 6 tests using inspect.iscoroutine() to verify each method returns a coroutine. All async tests use await.
criteria_verification.notes: All 6 ABC methods and all 6 InMemoryManifestRegistry methods are declared with 'async def'. TestRegistryMethodsAreAsync class has 6 tests using inspect.iscoroutine() to verify each method returns a coroutine. All async tests use await.
